tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Creepy Vampire Mashup (Creep - Radiohead / Vampire - Olivia Rodrigo)
Second-ever Mashup by Diana Guillermo! :D

[INTRO]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]

[VERSE 1 - VAMPIRE]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]F#7[/ch]
Hate to give the satisfaction asking how you're doing now [/tab]
[tab]                                                       [ch]G[/ch]
How's the castle built off people you pretend to care about?[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Gm[/ch]
Just what you wanted / Look at you, cool guy, you got it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
 I see the parties and the diamonds sometimes when I close[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#7[/ch]
my eyes 6 months of torture that you sold as some forbidden[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]Gm[/ch]
paradise, I loved you truly… You gotta laugh at the stupidity[/tab]

[CHORUS - CREEP]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
Cuz you’re a creep, you’re a weirdo.[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch]
What the hell are you doing here?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
You don't belong here.[/tab]

[VERSE 2 - CREEP]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
 … When you were here before,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F#[/ch]
couldn't look you in the eye.[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You're just like an angel,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
your skin makes me cry.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
You float like a feather,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
in a beautiful world[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I was special,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
you're so fucking special.[/tab]

[CHORUS - VAMPIRE]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
And I've made some real big mistakes[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]A7[/ch]
But you make the worst one look fine[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
I should've known it was strange[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
You only come out at night[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
I used to think I was smart[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
But you made me look so naïve[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
The way you sold me for parts[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#7[/ch]
As you sunk your teeth into me, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Bloodsucker, famefucker[/tab]
N.C.
Bleeding me dry cuz…

[VERSE 3 - CREEP]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
…You don't care if it hurts,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
You wanna have control.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
You want a perfect body,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
You want a perfect soul.[/tab]
                    
Well I want you to know…

[VERSE 3 - VAMPIRE]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
…that every girl I ever talked to told me[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#7[/ch]
you were bad, bad news[/tab]
[tab]                                                               [ch]G[/ch]
You called them crazy, God, I hate the way I called them crazy too[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]Gm[/ch]
You're so convincing. How do you lie without flinching?[/tab]

[CHORUS - CREEP]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]
You’re such a creep, such a weirdo.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
What the hell are you doing here?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]
You don’t belong here….[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh-ohhhh, oh-ohhhhhhhh[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]F#[/ch]
IIIIIII’m running out the door...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]
I’m running out, I run, run, run...[/tab]

[CHORUS - VAMPIRE]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]F#[/ch]
…YOOOOOU sank your teeth into me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oohhhh Like a creep[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I've made some real big mistakes[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A7[/ch]
But you make the worst one look fine[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
I should've known it was strange[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#7[/ch]
You only come out at night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I used to think I was smart[/tab]

But you made me

[CHORUS - CREEP]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
( run, run, run…)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]F#7[/ch]
Ruuuuuuuuuuun[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]
RUUUUUUUUUN….[/tab]
[tab]N.C.                 [ch]D[/ch]
You goddamn vampire[/tab]
